name: Rage Desire
explicitMods: 6% chance to receive additional Talismans when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
2% chance in Heists for Orbs of Transmutation to drop as Chaos Orbs instead

implicitMods: 171% increased Elemental Damage with Melee Weapons

70% increased Mana Burn rate

descrText: Right click to activate. Only one Tincture in your belt can be active at a time. Mana Burn causes you to lose 1% of your maximum Mana per stack per second. Can be deactivated manually, or will automatically deactivate when you reach 0 Mana.

name: Foulborn Headhunter
explicitMods: +55 to Dexterity
+72 to maximum Life
23% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters
When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds
mutatedMods: Rare and Unique Enemies within 120 metres have Minimap Icons
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

name: Progenesis
explicitMods: 20% reduced Charges per use
10% increased Duration
When Hit during effect, 25% of Life loss from Damage taken occurs over 4 seconds instead
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: They were bred in a cosmic ocean of raw creation.
Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

name: Wine of the Prophet
explicitMods: +60 to Maximum Charges
21% increased Charges per use

descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: "To proclaim a vision of the future is to make it so,
for those that have the will, and the way!"
- High Templar Andronicus

flavourText: "The long and venerable lineages of the Oriathan nobility tended
to produce Admirals with, shall we say... quick tempers."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have resonance of all three elements, and to grant resonance of elements other than the highest one in a hit. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Each attack with a melee weapon will choose an element at random, and will only be able to deal damage of that element. It will avoid choosing the same element twice in a row.
